mapper.select:
select FI.ORIGINAL_NAME ,FI.CHANGED_NAME ,FI.MIME ,FI.SAVE_PATH from FILE_INFO FI
inner join EVALUATION_DOC ED on (ED.FILE_NO = FI.FILE_NO) inner join EVALUATION_HISTORY EH on (EH.HISTORY_NO = ED.HISTORY_NO) inner join EVALUATION E on (E.EVALUATION_NO = EH.EVALUATION_NO) inner join COMPANY C on (C.COMPANY_NO = E.EVALUATION_NO)
where FI.FILE_NO = #{fileNo}
and C.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
